name: Seven Layer Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound boiled ham, cut into julienne strips
1/2 Pound Swiss cheese, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear spinach and lettuce into bite-size pieces.
2. Arrange the spinach at the bottom of a deep rectangular dish or straight-sided glass bowl.
3. Sprinkle 1/2 teaspoon of sugar, salt, and pepper over the spinach layer.
4. Add layers of eggs, ham, and lettuce on top.
5. Sprinkle remaining sugar, salt, and pepper over the layers.
6. Add layers of peas, onion slices, and Swiss cheese.
7. Mix sour cream and mayonnaise in a separate bowl.
8. Spread the dressing mixture evenly over the salad.
9. Cover the dish with plastic wrap or cover and refrigerate overnight.
10. Before serving, gently toss the salad to combine all ingredients.
Serves 10.
Martha's notes: Be sure to spread the dressing to the very edge of the bowl. I usually use a large brandy snifter.
